title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoscioides
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoscioides, also known as False Hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoscioides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoscioides include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
